message:
🐛 Fix Bob agent returning lazy summaries instead of analysis (#360)

Root cause: Bob CLI defaults to "code" mode which executes tools and
returns tool summaries like "Listed 17 item(s)." instead of analyzing
the data provided in the prompt.

Fixes:
1. Add --chat-mode ask flag so Bob analyzes data instead of executing
   tools — AI Missions provide all cluster data in the prompt
2. Fix JSON stats struct to match Bob CLI's actual output format
   (stats.models.premium.tokens, not usage.input_tokens)
3. Fix cleanBobOutput stripping all remaining lines after seeing any
   JSON-like line containing "usage"
4. Improve ---output--- marker extraction to correctly find content
   between the two markers

Before: "Listed 17 item(s)."
After: Full diagnostic report with health assessment, issues, actions,
and preventive measures.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
